framework.name: OAuth 2.1 Works Only for Single Trust Domain + Synchronous
framework.description: Explicit admission that existing OAuth 2.1 'may fall short in scenarios that are cross-domain, highly autonomous, or asynchronous.' This is the identity establishment saying the foundation isn't ready for multi-hop.
framework.raw_quote: Existing OAuth 2.1 frameworks, when used with AI agents, work well within single trust domains with synchronous agent operations... but may fall short in scenarios that are cross-domain, highly autonomous, or asynchronous
